utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 of these items. Each is fully specified with appropriate details: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) is clear; travel_dates (2024-10-05 to 2024-10-09) are specific; transportation includes airline name, flight class, cost, and currency; accommodation includes hotel name, price per night, total cost, and currency; activities list multiple entries with names, costs, and currency; additional_services include dining details with restaurant name, costs, and currency; total_budget provides total cost and currency. All required details are present and fully specified.
